ops.title: Fix codex scratchpad leak (cleanup, gitignore, prose tightening)
ops.description: .claude-scratch/codex-q-CtVZiC + codex-r-i0LuMG got committed+pushed in cc-skills: an agent improvised a repo-relative scratch dir instead of the documented mktemp -d fallback, and jj auto-snapshot picked it up (nothing gitignores the name). Fix: non-improvisable fallback prose in SKILL.md + codex-wrapper.md, gitignore safety nets (repo + repo-bootstrap base template), remove the leaked dir from the tree.

ops.text: .claude-scratch/ removed from the cc-skills tree and pushed (git ls-files | grep claude-scratch empty)
git check-ignore .claude-scratch/x exits 0 in cc-skills; base template gitignore carries .claude-scratch/
SKILL.md + codex-wrapper.md scratchpad fallback forbids invented/repo-relative dirs and keeps mktemp
